'''shathowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wychert|wychert]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wychert|wychert]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shathowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shætheweth|shætheweth]] || [[word:shæthewej|shæthewej]] || [[word:shæthewesh|shæthewesh]] || [[word:shæthewe|shæthewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathothowoth|shathothowoth]] || [[word:shathothowoj|shathothowoj]] || [[word:shathothowosh|shathothowosh]] || [[word:shathothowo|shathothowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathowoth|shathowoth]] || [[word:shathowoj|shathowoj]] || [[word:shathowosh|shathowosh]] || [[word:shathowo|shathowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathofwoth|shathofwoth]] || [[word:shathofwoj|shathofwoj]] || [[word:shathofwosh|shathofwosh]] || [[word:shathofwof|shathofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathowotho|shathowotho]] || [[word:shathowojo|shathowojo]] || [[word:shathowosho|shathowosho]] || [[word:shathowoko|shathowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathowoth|shathowoth]] || [[word:shathowoj|shathowoj]] || [[word:shathowosh|shathowosh]] || [[word:shathowo|shathowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathowothol|shathowothol]] || [[word:shathowojol|shathowojol]] || [[word:shathowoshol|shathowoshol]] || [[word:shathowokol|shathowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathowothotho|shathowothotho]] || [[word:shathowojojo|shathowojojo]] || [[word:shathowoshosho|shathowoshosho]] || [[word:shathowoko|shathowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathowothon|shathowothon]] || [[word:shathowojon|shathowojon]] || [[word:shathowoshon|shathowoshon]] || [[word:shathowokon|shathowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathowothoro|shathowothoro]] || [[word:shathowojoro|shathowojoro]] || [[word:shathowoshoro|shathowoshoro]] || [[word:shathowokoro|shathowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
